title: High-End Artist Music Editorial Poster AI
sourceTitle: High End Artist Music Editorial Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: 9:16 high-end artist editorial poster for dark idol album identity, using double silhouette artist poster with experimental typography. Subject: male idol performer appears in a premium music-magazine portrait or performance structure, with realistic human texture, expressive eyes, natural hair, and editorial styling. Scene: Dark design-driven music editorial environment with stage smoke, reflective floor, mic cable arc, and fragmented profile crop, controlled negative space, grain, print texture, and cinematic atmosphere. Composition: Fixed poster hierarchy shaped by typography: AFTER IMAGE is the main title, LIVE SESSION 01 is the secondary line, double silhouette artist poster with experimental typography determines the portrait/silhouette/glitch/performance structure without breaking the high-end editorial frame. Signature Elements: Preserved high end artist music editorial poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Premium music magazine cover, artist poster, album concept, stage visual, fashion editorial cover, black-and-white photography, strong contrast, experimental typography, and cinematic design finish. Color Palette: Fixed dark editorial palette of black, white, grey, dark silver, and one restrained accent color when needed. Lighting: Dramatic editorial shadows, controlled highlights on face or body tension, stage haze when present, and print-like contrast. Typography: AFTER IMAGE, LIVE SESSION 01, and stage smoke, reflective floor, mic cable arc, and fragmented profile crop appear as readable structural typography, not random text blocks. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: High End Artist Music Editorial Poster Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: 9:16 high-end artist editorial poster for electronic performance campaign, using fashion magazine music visual with abstract stage geometry. Subject: electronic musician appears in a premium music-magazine portrait or performance structure, with realistic human texture, expressive eyes, natural hair, and editorial styling. Scene: Dark design-driven music editorial environment with laser grid, side-profile portrait, transparent typography layers, and close hand detail, controlled negative space, grain, print texture, and cinematic atmosphere. Composition: Fixed poster hierarchy shaped by typography: NOISE BLOOM is the main title, AUDIO VISUAL NIGHT is the secondary line, fashion magazine music visual with abstract stage geometry determines the portrait/silhouette/glitch/performance structure without breaking the high-end editorial frame. Signature Elements: Preserved high end artist music editorial poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Premium music magazine cover, artist poster, album concept, stage visual, fashion editorial cover, black-and-white photography, strong contrast, experimental typography, and cinematic design finish. Color Palette: Fixed dark editorial palette of black, white, grey, dark silver, and one restrained accent color when needed. Lighting: Dramatic editorial shadows, controlled highlights on face or body tension, stage haze when present, and print-like contrast. Typography: NOISE BLOOM, AUDIO VISUAL NIGHT, and laser grid, side-profile portrait, transparent typography layers, and close hand detail appear as readable structural typography, not random text blocks. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
